event.summary: Prepared a source-first, planning-last push bundle without executing Git push.

acceptance.proof: A caller-selected nonzero byte maximum is checked before one dependency-free scan of the accepted LSLC-001R document shape; the parser admits only the declaration, LF/tab layout, fixed info-child order, balanced element structure, and final LF.
Public-safe independently authored fixtures cover accepted canonical documents and deterministic damaged, truncated, oversized, and non-canonical rejection classes.
Accepted state borrows the unchanged UTF-8 source and owns only bounded structural indexes; it performs no decoding, normalization, field interpretation, or runtime action.
Failures retain the first byte offset and expected shape class while dependency, feature, unsafe, I/O, socket, network, runtime, device, and authority surfaces remain closed.

document.commit_policy: Commit the bounded observed-document shape parser separately from general XML parsing, semantic field conversion, discovery, transport, runtime activation, dependencies, features, devices, and authority.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route LSLC-002A's strict borrowed document-shape parser and its non-interoperability boundary.
Describe accepted canonical shape, rejection fixtures, and source-only limits.
Review Rusty LSL public and authority routing; no skill mutation is expected.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Reviewed installed skill without public mutation.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Review artifact roles, bounded rejection evidence, closed activation, and authority separation for the new parser contract.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Reviewed installed skill; the parser remains source-only, allocation-fixed, inert, and separate from semantic, runtime, network, device, feature, and Manifold authority.

non_scope: General XML 1.0 parsing, attributes, namespaces, comments, processing instructions beyond the exact accepted declaration, CDATA, DTD, entity declaration or generic entity decoding.
Conversion into StreamDefinition, MetadataTree, volatile fields, owner witnesses, endpoint semantics, numeric values, identity, freshness, authorization, or currentness.

Broad liblsl, endpoint, protocol, wire, or ecosystem interoperability claims; discovery, inlet, outlet, clocks, buffering, recovery, FFI, sockets, networking, runtime activation, devices, dependencies, features, or effects.
Manifold admission, registry, subscription, route, lease, revision, replay, authorization, audit, session, topology, transport, command, product, or provider authority.
document.objective: Independently specify and implement one dependency-free bounded parser for the exact accepted LSLC-001R observed stream-info document shape. Admit canonical source by borrowing it unchanged and retaining bounded structural indexes; reject the first damaged, truncated, oversized, or non-canonical shape without claiming a general XML parser, endpoint interoperability, runtime behavior, networking, or authority.
outputs: A nonzero byte-limit contract and borrowed accepted document-shape state.
A single-pass canonical shape scanner with deterministic byte-offset errors and bounded structural storage.
Public-safe valid, damaged, truncated, oversized, and non-canonical fixtures grounded in XML 1.0 syntax and accepted LSLC-001H/R provenance.
Focused parser-shape, fixture, public-boundary, and inert-closure validation.
